ThisForm.Get_DataF.Enabled = .t.
ThisForm.cntBotoes.Visible = .f.

If Messagebox('Confirma a Geraçăo do Arquivo?', 4+32+256, '') = 6

	_pData = Thisform.get_DataF.Value
	
	Select MovAux
	Set Order to EmpCont
	Go Top
	
	DataProc = Datas

With ThisForm

	If (.poDataMgr.pnIdconn > 0)

=fConfigGeral()

Create Cursor MovAux (AnoFis c(4), Datas c(8), Contas c(9), Debs c(12), Creds c(12), Docto c(10), Hists c(70), ;

* Fim **************************************************************************************

If (This.Value <> 2) && Se Năo Clicou em Saída
	If Empty(ThisForm.Get_DataI.value)
		Messagebox('Data Inicial Inválida!!!',0+48,'')

		Return 0
	Endif
